description: An Environmental Health & Safety specialist needs physical/chemical properties for Benzene (CAS 71-43-2) for a workplace hazard assessment. Document the following properties from the CAMEO Chemicals datasheet (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/): Boiling Point, Melting/Freezing Point, Flash Point, Vapor Pressure, Specific Gravity, Lower Explosive Limit (LEL), Upper Explosive Limit (UEL), IDLH, Vapor Density, and Water Solubility. Save the results, including property names, values, and units, to ~/Documents/benzene_properties.txt with each property on its own line. Additional request details are available in ~/Desktop/safety_assessment_request.txt.
